title: Langu Langu Lyrics Saravanan Irukka Bayamaen

Langu Langu Lyrics Saravanan Irukka Bayamaen

langu langu labakkaru
oturaanga scooter-u.
dingu dingu dimikkaru
suththi paaru tractor-u

muttiyila soru pongi
moodi vachcha korangu nee
muttaatha enna vandhu
mookkaruppen odhungu nee

vattiyila soru ponga
vakkillaatha amukka nee
vetti kadha pesaiyila
soriya vaikkum serangu nee

kattaiyila unna thaechi
aakkiduven chappaathi.
ennaiyila unna veesi
porichiduven rasaathi.

langu langu labakkaru
oturaanga scooter-u.
dingu dingu dimikkaru
suththi paaru tractor-u(2)

kozhi mutta kannu
adhu kannu illa bannu
omeletta pottu
unna pogaporen thinnu

ippo edhukku poti
nee panna venaam lootti
yegathukku aadinaale
aava neeyum raatti.

vitturu vitturu thimira
nee velanji thongura avarai.
aanaji unna kuzhambu vachchaa
mudiyumaa nee nimura.

aalu valarndha pakki
un arivu pochu makki.
kizhinju pona touserula
kaanaa pochu kokki.

langu langu labakkaru
oturaanga scooter-u.
dingu dingu dimikkaru
suththi paaru tractor-u(2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Langu Langu?

The song is a peppy and energetic track that adds a fun element to the movie.

Who is the music director of Langu Langu?

The music director is D Imman.

What role does the song play in Saravanan Irukka Bayamaen?

The song adds a lively and entertaining moment in the film, enhancing the celebratory mood.

Who performed the vocals for Langu Langu?

The song is sung by Praniti.

When was Langu Langu released?

The song was released on March 31, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Langu Langu is a lively and upbeat song from the movie Saravanan Irukka Bayamaen, composed by D Imman. Sung by Praniti, the track is filled with energetic beats and catchy lyrics, making it a perfect fit for party scenes in the film. The song captures a sense of fun and celebration, reflecting the joyous moments in the storyline. Its vibrant rhythm and playful tone make it a memorable addition to the movie's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Langu Langu from the movie Saravanan Irukka Bayamaen is a vibrant and energetic track that will get you moving. With D Imman's catchy beats and Praniti's lively vocals, this song is a perfect party anthem. Dive into the fun and peppy vibe that makes this track a standout in the film's soundtrack.
stanzaMeanings: Scooter is running noisily. Look around, the tractor is making noise.
You're like a monkey with rice overflowing from a pot. Don't mess with me, or I'll deal with you.
You're stuffing rice in a bowl without a lid. You talk nonsense and cause trouble.
I'll roll you out like dough and make you into a chapati. I'll fry you in oil, dear.
Scooter is running noisily. Look around, the tractor is making noise.
The egg from the chicken is not an eye, it's a treat. I'll make an omelette and eat you up.
Don't compete now, don't act smart. If you dance fast, you'll become tired.
Let go of your arrogance, you're like a dried bean. If I make you into a curry, can you handle it?
The bird has grown, and your intelligence is gone. The pocket is missing in your torn trousers.
Scooter is running noisily. Look around, the tractor is making noise.
